privileged_info_summary: The charity_silent_auction@1 task creates a synthetic LibreOffice Calc spreadsheet with 10 auction items, 23 bids (NOT 25+ as claimed in README), and 18 registered bidders. The data is generated by a Python script using odfpy. Expected outcomes are: 6 items sold for $885 total revenue, 2 items below reserve price, 2 items with no bids, requiring 4 items to be flagged for attention. Business rules define three minimum bid increment tiers ($0-$49: $5 raise, $50-$199: $10 raise, $200+: $25 raise) and three item status categories (SOLD, BELOW RESERVE, NO BIDS). The task has a 300-second timeout, 50 max steps, medium difficulty.
